title: Isen (star)

*[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]<ref name="Region">The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the portions of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] that fall in grid square N-5 in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]].</ref>

|class=[[Star/Legends#Types of stars|G]]<ref>''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]'' identifies Isen as possessing a yellow star-type. ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' specifies that yellow stars are class G.</ref>

'''Isen''' was the highly [[Radiation/Legends|radioactive]] yellow primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Isen system/Legends|Isen system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] and had a [[Isen|similarly named]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] it.

{{Star-stub}}
